collectorDecision.rationale: Planning phase completed successfully. Comprehensive test plan generated with 18 test cases across 6 test domains (propagation emission, filter emission, transformer relationships, null output handling, orphan handling, deduplication). Implementation plan includes 11 sequential steps with clear dependencies and complexity estimates. Test matrix covers all critical paths identified in discovery phase. Coverage targets established (85% overall, 90%+ for critical paths). Risk assessment and mitigation strategies documented. Plan is actionable and ready for test implementation.

criticalScenarios: Null output logging and audit trail
Null output with artifact tree impact
Orphan persistence despite late parent arrival
Intermediate artifact creation for missing paths
Content hash deduplication for identical artifacts

validationStrategy.level1: Unit Tests - Individual component method testing with mocked dependencies
validationStrategy.level2: Integration Tests - Cross-component interaction with real/in-memory event bus
validationStrategy.level3: End-to-End Tests - Full workflow with all components and tree building
validationStrategy.level4: Database Validation - Direct database queries verifying persistence correctness

stepsSummary: Step 1: Create test infrastructure and base classes
Step 2-3: Implement unit tests for core components and null output handling
Step 4-6: Implement integration tests for propagation, transformer, and filter services
Step 9: Execute all tests and generate coverage reports
Step 10: Performance and load testing (1000+ artifacts)

highRiskAreas.area: Orphan artifact handling under high concurrency
highRiskAreas.risk: Race conditions in orphan buffering and parent linking
highRiskAreas.mitigation: Implement thread-safety tests with concurrent artifact insertion
Implement referential integrity tests and cascade behavior validation

highRiskAreas.risk: Tree operations may degrade with thousands of artifacts
highRiskAreas.mitigation: Load testing with 1000+ artifacts and performance profiling

testExecution: All unit tests pass (target: 95% success rate)
All integration tests pass (target: 100% success rate)
All end-to-end tests pass (target: 100% success rate)
codeQuality: Code coverage meets targets (overall 85%, critical paths 90%+)
Performance metrics within acceptable range (<5s for tree building of 1000 artifacts)
functionalValidation: No orphaned artifacts in test database
All parent-child relationships verified correct in database
Null output handling verified across all execution paths
Event emission and persistence verified for all artifact types

recommendations.recommendation: Prioritize Step 1-3 (test infrastructure and unit tests) as foundation for all integration tests. This provides early feedback on core component correctness before investing in integration test development.
Integrate database validation queries into each test level rather than only at the end. This provides immediate feedback on persistence correctness during test execution.
Execute load testing (Step 10) incrementally: start with 100 artifacts, then 500, then 1000. This helps identify performance degradation points progressively.
Add thread-safety tests for orphan buffering and parent linking (identified as high-risk area). Consider using stress testing frameworks like JCStress.

readinessAssessment.planQuality: COMPREHENSIVE - Test matrix covers all critical paths from discovery phase
readinessAssessment.implementationReadiness: HIGH - Clear step sequence with dependencies and complexity estimates
readinessAssessment.testCoverageReadiness: HIGH - Coverage targets defined for overall and critical paths
readinessAssessment.riskMitigation: ADEQUATE - High-risk areas identified with mitigation strategies
readinessAssessment.successCriteria: CLEAR - Objective acceptance criteria defined for all test levels
